$comment: FREEFORM LINK CARDS — the Linktree-style hub. Caitlin adds/edits/reorders these in /admin.
Anything she wants to push this week: a discount code, a giveaway, a guide, a new reel.
Anything with active:false is hidden. Reorder by changing 'order'.
Seeded empty on purpose — no invented URLs.
